Parlays (Combos) docs are now live on @Polymarket! 

the 0→1 unlock in the design is compression.

won a leg in your parlay? collapse it and pull the cash out now. you don't have to wait for every market to resolve.

no more dead capital sitting locked until the last leg settles!!!
